name: logistics carriers managing 5–15 vehicles tool
description: For logistics carriers managing 5–15 vehicles, inefficient fuel usage causes increased operational costs. We monitor fuel consumption and flag anomalies instead of manual tracking of fuel consumption.
problem_solved: inefficient fuel usage leading to increased operational costs
features: manual data entry for historical fuel records

must_have_features: manual data entry for historical fuel records
